---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new node or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it solves

What workflow or use case does this enable? What is currently painful or impossible?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like it to work. Include parameter names, expected inputs/outputs, or any ComfyUI API endpoints it would use.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples that might help.
